expected_path_note: business_share=Y -> SC1=Y (was chairman, senior exec/board - is-or-was) -> set_flag -> final_status_check=MI (file only says 'stepped back', does not confirm departure of shares/board seat) -> siap (MI at final_status_check routes directly to siap, conservative, bypassing cooldown)
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 29 – Board Role Status Unclear After Reported Step-Back
activities: Tomasz Nowak was for many years the majority owner and chairman of a contracting company that built ministry buildings for the government of Turkmenistan, generating the bulk of the company's revenue. The relationship manager's most recent note states only that Mr Nowak 'has stepped back from the company' after a change in family circumstances; the file does not confirm whether he has sold his shares, resigned his board seat, or retains any ownership or governance role, and no updated shareholder register or resignation letter has been obtained.
origin_of_assets: Dividends and proceeds from his ownership of the contracting company.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Assets dominated by his shareholding in the contracting company; current status of that shareholding is unconfirmed.
